sections.biography-sanguo-yanyi:
Fan Cheng was a servant of the Han Dynasty. In AD 196, in the novel, Romance of the Three Kingdoms, when Cao Cao received Emperor Xian in Xuchang and made Xuchang the new capital of China, Fan Cheng was appointed a prefect of Luoyang along with Dong Zhao.

An effort to uncover Fan Cheng in a historic work has not revealed information about him, hence there is a fair chance he is a fictional character.

full_text:
Fan Cheng 范成
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Fan Cheng (范成). Appointed a prefect of Luoyang when Cao Cao moved the capital to Xuchang. Fan Cheng may not have existed in history. Fan Cheng was affiliated with the Han Dynasty and the Wei Kingdom.

BiographySanguo Yanyi
Fan Cheng was a servant of the Han Dynasty. In AD 196, in the novel,Romance of the Three Kingdoms, when Cao Cao received Emperor Xian in Xuchang and made Xuchang the new capital of China, Fan Cheng was appointed a prefect of Luoyang along with Dong Zhao.
An effort to uncover Fan Cheng in a historic work has not revealed information about him, hence there is a fair chance he is a fictional character.
